---
name: Feature request
about: Something you want PyMillCAM to do that it doesn't yet.
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## The job you're trying to do

<!-- What are you actually trying to make? A real example (with a
     DXF if possible) is worth more than an abstract description. -->

## What you'd like the tool to do

<!-- How would you want this to work from the UI? Menu item,
     shortcut, new op type, etc. -->

## What you do today instead

<!-- Manual workaround, another tool, giving up? Helps gauge how
     painful the gap is. -->

## Scope check

PyMillCAM targets 2D/2.5D CAM for hobby CNC routers and mills.
Full 3D, 4/5-axis, and production-grade feed optimisation are
out of scope — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`. Is the request inside that
box? (If you're not sure, ask; not every "no" is a closed door.)
